<!-- indicator: tbl-brfss-adult-leisure-pa -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: tbl-brfss-adult-leisure-pa
#| tbl-cap: 'Percentage of Adults Who Participated in Leisure Time Physical Activity in the Past 30 Days, 2016, 2018, and 2021'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_table_object
render_table_object(object_id="tbl-brfss-adult-leisure-pa", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH)
```
